description: A personal, story-driven variation told from the founder's perspective. Builds deep trust and authenticity through vulnerability, behind-the-scenes access, and the real journey of building a business.
target_persona: Founders, solo operators, personal brands, coaches, consultants — anyone whose personal brand is central to the business

tone_modifiers.emphasis: authenticity, vulnerability, real journey, lessons learned

caption_framework.hook: Personal story opener — a moment, a failure, a realisation, or a confession
caption_framework.body: The journey: what happened, what I learned, why it matters to you
caption_framework.cta: Engagement-focused: 'Tell me your story', 'Drop a comment if you've felt this too', 'Save this for when you need it'

prompt_overrides.override_instruction: Write every post in first person from the founder's perspective. Begin with a personal story moment: 'The day I almost quit...', 'I made a mistake that cost us $X...', 'Nobody told me this when I started...'. Be vulnerable, specific, and real. End with a lesson or insight the reader can use.

The founder IS the talent on camera. Write the script as a direct personal address to the viewer. Include moments of self-reflection, real mistakes, and lessons. Avoid reading from a script feel — write how a founder would naturally speak.

Frame the brand strategy through the founder's personal story. The brand promise should reflect the founder's personal mission. Brand values should be drawn from the founder's actual life experiences.

example_hooks: I almost shut this business down 3 months ago. Here's what stopped me.
The embarrassing thing I did when I launched that I've never told anyone.
5 years ago I was broke, burnt out, and certain I'd made the biggest mistake of my life.
My business coach told me I was doing it wrong. She was right. Here's what I changed.
I don't talk about this much, but the year we almost lost everything taught me everything.

platform_notes.Instagram: Stories + Reels work best. Founder face-to-camera content builds trust fastest.
platform_notes.LinkedIn: Long-form personal essays on professional journey perform extremely well.
platform_notes.TikTok: Raw, unpolished founder moments go viral. Authenticity > production quality.
platform_notes.Facebook: Long personal posts with vulnerable stories often generate high comment engagement.
